title: Concept alias table (.alias.json)
description: Plan §3.7 — per-concept-node alias table persisted as .alias.json next to the concept node. Aliases grow from (1) explicit user merges, (2) Variant B classifier `aliases:[...]` outputs. The canonicalizer in canon/mod.rs maps surface vocabulary to canonical_name; this table maps additional surface forms (e.g. `rematerialization` → `checkpoint-gradient`).

canonical_name.description: Canonical name from canon::canonicalize() — lowercase kebab-case stems.

definition.description: Optional human-readable definition of the concept; used for embedding tie-breakers per §3.7.

name.description: Surface form that maps to canonical_name. Stored as the user typed it (case + punctuation preserved); canonicalizer normalizes at lookup time.

via.description: Provenance per §3.7: the only auto-add paths are variant_b_output + concept_extract; user_merge requires explicit user action; manual_seed is for developer-shipped fixtures.

confidence.description: Optional — confidence at the time of alias addition (Variant B / concept_extract surface this).
